source_features: aggregation: duration-weighted mean of per-track substrate embeddings
source_tracks: Sonic 3D Blast JP/EU (Mega Drive, 1996) — primary composition credit
driver: Sega custom SMPS-derived driver (JP/EU version, not GEMS)
style_descriptors: melodic, structured arcade style, diatonic-leaning with chromatic ornament
low_variance_axes: constraint (0.07 std), basin_permeability (consistent hard cuts)
evidence.notes: Artist-level aggregate of 12 tracks attributed to Tatsuyuki Maeda. Low std_dev on constraint (0.07) indicates a consistent compositional approach across the catalog. basin_permeability is consistently low (0.24) reflecting the SMPS-driver hard-section architecture used in the JP/EU Sonic 3D Blast driver (not GEMS). This aggregate will be updated when additional Maeda tracks are reparsed into the atlas.
